languages.text: "Итак. Дельфим пал, а ты все же добрал{mf|ся|ась} до святая святых Кьявы Гамма. Ты стоишь чуть большего внимания, чем я предполагал изначально".

traits.locale_text: "Итак. Дельфим пал, а ты все же добрал{mf|ся|ась} до святая святых Кьявы Гамма. Ты стоишь чуть большего внимания, чем я предполагал изначально".
"Итак. Дельфим пал, а ты все же добрал{mf|ся|ась} до святая святых Кьявы Гамма. Ты стоишь чуть большего внимания, чем я предполагал изначально".

languages.text: "Very well. Delphim has fallen, and you have managed to reach Kiava Gamma's Sanctum Sanctorum. You warrant slightly more attention than I originally was prepared to give."
languages.original_text: "Итак. Дельфим пал, а ты все же добрал{mf|ся|ась} до святая святых Кьявы Гамма. Ты стоишь чуть большего внимания, чем я предполагал изначально".

traits.locale_text: "Very well. Delfim fell, and you managed to reach Kiava Gamma's Sanctum Sanctorum. You deserve slightly more attention than I originally was prepared to give."
"Very well. Delfim fell, and you managed to reach Kiava Gamma's Sanctum Sanctorum. You deserve slightly more attention than I originally was prepared to give."
"Very well. Delphim has fallen, and you have managed to reach Kiava Gamma's Sanctum Sanctorum. You warrant slightly more attention than I originally was prepared to give."
"Very well. Delphim has fallen, and you have managed to reach Kiava Gamma's Sanctum Sanctorum. You warrant slightly more attention than I originally was prepared to give."
"Very well. Delphim has fallen, and you have managed to reach Kiava Gamma's Sanctum Sanctorum. You warrant slightly more attention than I originally was prepared to give."

languages.text: "Nun gut. Delphim ist gefallen, und du hast es geschafft, Kiava Gammas Sanctum Sanctorum zu erreichen. Du verdienst etwas mehr Aufmerksamkeit, als ich ursprünglich bereit war zu geben."
languages.original_text: "Very well. Delphim has fallen, and you have managed to reach Kiava Gamma's Sanctum Sanctorum. You warrant slightly more attention than I originally was prepared to give."

traits.locale_text: "Nun gut. Delphim ist gefallen, und du hast es geschafft, Kiava Gammas Sanctum Sanctorum zu erreichen. Du verdienst etwas mehr Aufmerksamkeit, als ich ursprünglich bereit war zu geben."

languages.text: "Très bien. Delphim est tombé, et vous avez réussi à atteindre le Sanctum Sanctorum de Kiava Gamma. Vous méritez un peu plus d'attention que ce que j'étais prêt à vous accorder à l'origine."
languages.original_text: "Very well. Delphim has fallen, and you have managed to reach Kiava Gamma's Sanctum Sanctorum. You warrant slightly more attention than I originally was prepared to give."

traits.locale_text: "Très bien. Delphim est tombé, et vous avez réussi à atteindre le Sanctum Sanctorum de Kiava Gamma. Vous méritez un peu plus d'attention que ce que j'étais prêt à vous accorder à l'origine."

languages.text: "Muy bien. Delphim ha caído, y has conseguido llegar al Sanctum Sanctorum de Kiava Gamma. Mereces algo más de atención de la que estaba dispuesto a prestarte".
languages.original_text: "Very well. Delphim has fallen, and you have managed to reach Kiava Gamma's Sanctum Sanctorum. You warrant slightly more attention than I originally was prepared to give."

traits.locale_text: "Muy bien. Delphim ha caído, y has conseguido llegar al Sanctum Sanctorum de Kiava Gamma. Mereces algo más de atención de la que estaba dispuesto a prestarte".

languages.text: "Pekâlâ. Delphim düştü ve siz Kiava Gama'nın Sanctum Sanctorum'una ulaşmayı başardınız. Başlangıçta göstermeye hazır olduğum ilgiden biraz daha fazlasını hak ediyorsunuz."
languages.original_text: "Very well. Delphim has fallen, and you have managed to reach Kiava Gamma's Sanctum Sanctorum. You warrant slightly more attention than I originally was prepared to give."

traits.locale_text: "Pekâlâ. Delphim düştü ve siz Kiava Gama'nın Sanctum Sanctorum'una ulaşmayı başardınız. Başlangıçta göstermeye hazır olduğum ilgiden biraz daha fazlasını hak ediyorsunuz."
